title: Installing Approved Software from the Software Catalog
text:
Q: How do I install approved software from the software catalog?
A: Windows: Step 1: Open the Start menu and type 'Software Center' to launch the Software Center application. Step 2: In the Software Center, navigate to the 'Applications' tab to view the list of approved software. Step 3: Browse or search for the software you wish to install. Step 4: Click on the software name and then select the 'Install' button. Step 5: Follow any on-screen prompts to complete the installation. macOS: Step 1: Open 'Self Service' from your Applications folder or Launchpad. Step 2: Once Self Service is open, you will see a list of available software. Step 3: Use the search bar or scroll to find the software you want to install. Step 4: Click on the software name, then click the 'Install' button. Step 5: Wait for the installation to complete, and you may need to enter your Mac user password to authorize the installation. Step 6: After installation, you can find the software in your Applications folder. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
